form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months won by 2.5 len at this track April 12 over 1609m defeating Fixation carrying 60kg at $12. Previously second-up 7th of 16 at Gowran Park on April 23 over 1609m, on a wet track; 8 len behind Scott Key carrying 57kg at $6. Sure to go well again. Strips fitter and is sure to measure up.
